title: Anti-collision system of a military aircraft detects a UFO and suffers interference in Rondônia [2014]
excerpt: MAR 13th, 2014. At 9:00 am, near Porto Velho, Rondônia, a Brazilian Air Force R-99 aircraft reported the detection of an unidentified flying object at about 10 NM [Nautical Miles] by its ACAS [Onboard Anticollision System]. During the 5 minute duration of object detection, an interference in the ACAS / TCAS equipment was reported. The […]
text_preview: MAR 13th, 2014. At 9:00 am, near Porto Velho, Rondônia, a Brazilian Air Force R-99 aircraft reported the detection of an unidentified flying object at about 10 NM [Nautical Miles] by its ACAS [Onboard Anticollision System]. During the 5 minute duration of object detection, an interference in the ACAS / TCAS equipment was reported. The following are the comments on the report collected by the representative of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command]: “It was reported by the Guardian 96 tri [crew], a TCAS / ACAS [Onboard Anticollision System] conflict with an unknown object in the vicinit
summary: Brazilian Air Force R-99 aircraft near Porto Velho detected a UFO on its ACAS system and reported equipment interference for 5 minutes.
